name: Chickpea Soup- Hasa Al-Hummus
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 cup chickpeas (soaked in water overnight and drained) and 8 cups water in a saucepan. Bring to boil, then cover and cook over medium heat for 1 hour.
2. In a frying pan, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil. Stir-fry 2 medium onions (chopped), 8 cloves garlic (chopped into small pieces), and 1 small hot pepper (finely chopped) until they begin to brown.
3. Add the contents of the frying pan with the remaining ingredients: 1/2 cup coriander leaves, 2 teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon pepper, 1 teaspoon ground mustard seeds, and 1/4 cup lemon juice to the chickpeas in the saucepan. Cover and cook over medium heat for 1 hour or until chickpeas are well-cooked.
This is a basic, yet delicious, chickpea-based soup.
